## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress, strategy deliverables, and new SEO questions.](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content:** 6 new drafts are due EOW. The "Customer Feedback" article will be a refresh, not a new piece, to avoid duplication.](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [**Strategy:** The technical audit is delayed by internal priorities but is a prerequisite for the final strategy recommendations, which are now due in \~2.5 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [**SEO:** The "TLDR" format will be revised for human readability (e.g., using callout boxes) while retaining its SEO structure. Erik will investigate how to make AI-generated apps SEO-indexable, a known challenge.](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)

## Topics

### Strategy Deliverables & Timeline

  - [**Concern:** The project is midway through week 6, raising questions about the timeline for SoW deliverables.](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [**Technical Audit:** Delayed by higher-priority internal requests.](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
      - [**Status:** Draft expected today (Nov 5) or early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
      - [**Significance:** A prerequisite for the final strategy recommendations.](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [**Final Recommendations:** Now due in \~2.5 weeks. Erik is pushing to meet the deadline despite the initial project delays.](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [**Content Volume:** The SoW includes 20 published articles. This is a separate goal that can be met more easily than the analysis-heavy strategy work.](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)

### Content Production & Publishing

  - [**New Drafts:** 6 articles are in progress and due by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [**"Customer Feedback" Article:**](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
      - [**Issue:** The draft appeared to be a duplicate of an existing article.](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
      - [**Resolution:** It will be a refresh of the existing piece, incorporating the 10 methods provided by Bubble.](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [**CMS Publishing:**](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
      - [**Goal:** Streamline the publishing process in Ghost.](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
      - [**Action:** Erik will schedule a 15-min walkthrough with Sara to learn about specific quirks (e.g., featured posts, tables) and create a guide for the GrowthX publishing team.](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)

### SEO Experiment: "TLDR" Sections

  - [**Feedback:** The current "TLDR" format is jarring and feels robotic.](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [**Goal:** Improve human readability while retaining SEO benefits.](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [**Proposed Changes:**](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
      - [**Formatting:** Use Ghost's native modules (e.g., callout boxes) to visually separate the summary.](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
      - [**Title:** Experiment with more user-friendly labels (e.g., "Here's what you need to know").](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The "TLDR" structure is the key SEO element, not the specific title.](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [**Supporting Data:** A large-scale test with client Airbyte (30 control vs. 30 experimental posts) shows early signals of higher average click-through and better search positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)

### New SEO Question: AI-Generated Apps

  - [**Question:** How to make AI-generated apps on Bubble SEO-indexable to increase platform authority?](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
  - [**Challenge:** AI-generated content is often not indexed by search engines.](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
      - [**Precedent:** GrowthX's work with client Lovable showed their AI-generated apps had no SEO visibility. Retroactively fixing this is a significant effort.](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
  - [**Current Bubble Showcase:** The `bubble.io/app-gallery` features user-submitted apps selected by Bubble, not automatically generated ones.](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)
  - [**Idea:** A "remixable template" system could incentivize users to create showcase-worthy apps by offering credits for template usage.](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)

### Request: AI Image Generation Process

  - [**Request:** Bubble's design team is interested in the process and prompts used for AI-generated blog artwork.](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)
  - [**Goal:** Learn from GrowthX's workflow to improve internal efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)
  - [**Action:** Erik will ask designer Katya to share her multi-step process and the "master prompt" used for Bubble's images.](https://fathom.video/share/PDYAMFWjqHty4h2snKdwAsLL8ZyUYj45?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)
